Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Miguel Paltao.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cora Norman is present.
Attorney Thomas Drohan representing the defendant through full scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-10-2012 is vacated.
